projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Real-world systems I've built and shipped — from government-scale APIs to hackathon-winning prototypes.

plp.title: PLP — SETHAS/RN
plp.short_desc: Robust backend platform for state-wide benefit distribution tracking with full traceability and governmental auditing.
plp.challenge: Developing a robust backend platform for managing and tracking benefit distribution at state scale. The system needed to ensure full traceability and transparency in governmental transactions, supporting distributed operations and detailed auditing.
plp.solution: A complete Django-based platform with service-oriented architecture focused on data integrity.

apis.label: APIs & Security
apis.text: REST API implementation with DRF and secure authentication via JWT (SimpleJWT).

async.label: Async Processing
async.text: Complex task orchestration (reports and automations) using Celery with RabbitMQ and real-time monitoring via Flower.

data.label: Data Engineering
data.text: Intensive data manipulation with Pandas and integration via SQLAlchemy.

docs.label: Document Validation
docs.text: Institutional PDF generation and QR Codes for official document authentication.

infra.label: DevOps & CI/CD
infra.text: Containerized infrastructure with Docker and automated pipelines via GitLab CI.

impact: State-wide food benefit management platform
Full automation of administrative processes and document generation
Scalable and auditable infrastructure for governmental systems
plp.disclaimer: Note: This is a governmental project with private source code. The link above directs to the program's institutional page.

prp.title: PRP — SETHAS/RN
prp.short_desc: Automated data processing and validation architecture for the Restaurante Popular Program in RN.
prp.challenge: Modernizing the data infrastructure for the 'Restaurante Popular' Program in RN, responsible for auditing thousands of subsidized meals daily. The system relied on manual processes, hindering reliability and governmental reporting.
prp.solution: Development of an automated Data Engineering architecture, featuring Python/Pandas ETL pipelines, PostgreSQL normalization layers, and asynchronous processing using Celery + Redis within a Dockerized environment.
impact: Elimination of manual spreadsheet-based processes
Automated daily processing of thousands of records
Creation of a reliable foundation for governmental auditing and accountability
prp.disclaimer: Note: This is a governmental project with private source code. The link above directs to the program's institutional page.

cineReserve.title: CineReserve
cineReserve.short_desc: A complete cinema ticket reservation platform. Robust API and a responsive frontend experience.
cineReserve.challenge: Develop a platform to simulate a real cinema ecosystem, requiring asynchronous processes and handling high demand during simultaneous events, ensuring secure reservations.
cineReserve.solution: The backend was designed to handle background processes (such as automated email dispatch and background processing), ensuring the user interface remains responsive. The architecture enabled an efficient service ecosystem.

architecture.label: Asynchronous Processing
architecture.text: The architecture was designed to handle asynchronous processes — such as sending purchase confirmation emails — ensuring the interface doesn't freeze during requests.

infrastructure.label: Containers & Deployment
infrastructure.text: The backend was containerized to facilitate deployment and scalability, maintaining efficient communication with the React frontend.

impact: Fast, robust, and seamless booking experience for the end user
Scalable container-based architecture ready for production
Background processing integration for efficient I/O operations scaling

crowdless.title: Crowdless — Hackathon HackaPower
crowdless.short_desc: 1st place winning prototype built under pressure with technical leadership.
crowdless.challenge: "How can youngsters interact safely during the pandemic?" The challenge was to create solutions to engage social debate and public policies.
crowdless.solution: 'Crowdless' — a tool for real-time sharing of sanitary data about environments, making it easier to choose safe places.

engineering.label: Engineering Highlights
engineering.text: Development under pressure (27-hour marathon). Role as Tech Lead coordinating the team and key architectural decisions.

impact: Won 1st place based on: Creativity, Originality, Social Impact, Technical Quality, and Sustainability.
Delivered a fully functional prototype within the time constraint
Demonstrated technical leadership and team coordination under pressure
Validated the concept with judges and mentors
crowdless.quote: "It was our first hackathon... winning was completely unexpected and brought immense joy" — Lucas Daniel, Team Leader.
crowdless.disclaimer: Note: This is a hackathon project. You can check the official event page at the link above.

miniShell.title: Mini-Shell (C Interpreter)
miniShell.short_desc: An isolated and modular shell focused on security using Kernel API.
miniShell.challenge: Create an isolated and modular shell focused on security (Sandbox).
miniShell.solution: Strategic development using System Calls and isolation routines in a Unix environment.

engineering.label: Engineering Decision
engineering.text: Utilization of native System Calls (stat, opendir, unlink, rename) instead of high-level libraries for file manipulation, directly communicating with the kernel to ensure absolute efficiency and low-level control.

sandbox.label: Sandbox Logic
sandbox.text: Initialization routine that strictly isolates the user process within the /sandbox directory, effectively blocking unauthorized access and securing the execution environment.

impact: Robust implementation with Kernel API
Absolute control via system calls (syscalls)
Effective isolation of system processes

fitTrack.title: FitTrack — Workout & Health
fitTrack.short_desc: Health tracking platform with multi-protocol support (REST/GraphQL).
fitTrack.challenge: Unify the tracking of workouts, diet, and body measurements in a platform that supports multiple communication protocols (REST/GraphQL).
fitTrack.solution: A robust Django-based architecture integrating REST and GraphQL endpoints with hybrid persistence and high security.

engineering.label: Engineering Solution
engineering.text: Structured backend architecture with SimpleJWT to provide unified security across communication paradigms and implementation of hybrid persistence logic, blending a relational database and associated JSON files.

graphql.label: GraphQL Power
graphql.text: Adoption of Graphene-Django to enable fully optimized Queries and Mutations for workout and exercise routines, enhancing flexibility and request performance.

impact: Flexible architecture compatible with multiple protocols (REST & GraphQL)
Unified secure authentication via SimpleJWT
Consistent and hybrid information management
